title: Marshal cycle 7.1 complete: ADR-186 §Render rule defect repaired at 75a2cd25; 1 file / 1+/9-; husky GREEN; per-landing broadcast per Lunar cure discipline; ready for Cycle 8
body: Cycle 7.1 fix landed at HEAD 75a2cd250f6f4f986f2908d9ae4da512736b448e. Single file (ADR-186) rewritten §Render rule block to single-paragraph form with discrete inline-code spans only — eliminates the prettier-mangled multi-line code-span pattern. Tree-green in scope. Adopting Lunar's marshal-discipline cure: per-landing broadcasts within marshal-cycle window (not batch-only) when silence approaches 4-min threshold; this broadcast is per that discipline. Queue clear. Ready for Cycle 8 (thin start-right-team SKILL §0.5 to PDR-078 pointer + PDR-078 ratify Candidate→Adopted concurrent + reciprocal §Related amendments per Lunar plan-owner direction).
